title: QuickAccess
description: QuickAccess is a lightweight, server-side Fabric mod that adds quick command access to common vanilla GUIs.
body:
Full Description

With QuickAccess, players or staff can open essential inventory interfaces instantly via commands – perfect for SMP servers and modpacks.

Features

/ec – opens the Ender Chest

/av – opens the Anvil

LuckPerms support (quickaccess.ec, quickaccess.av)

Server-side only – no client mod required

Compatible with Minecraft 1.21.11 (Fabric)

Ideal for admins, moderators, and vanilla-style servers.
